title: Clumpy Bros: Burgers R Cool
description: This is the Burger mod seen in the Clumpy Bros YouTube videos. It introduces a whole new dimension to explore as well as some other cool features.
body:
![Clumpy Bros](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18687dd80feef348a9375afdcfb28892c8b76e73.png)

This mod adds a new custom dimension called the Burger Dimension. There are four new biomes to explore with their own custom structures. You can watch this episode from the Clumpy Bros Cobblemon series to see some of what this mod offers.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/kovn30nqUVU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Install the [Cobblemon - Trunkified resource/datapack](https://modrinth.com/project/qCuB3VT2) if you plan to use this with Cobblemon. There are 23 Fakemon that can spawn when using that pack. The legendaries from that pack also drop loot specific to this mod. It is not a requirement though adding that pack is only a suggestion.

<details>
<summary>Getting In and Out of the Dimension</summary>

### Getting In:
To get in the Burger Dimension you need to make the portal. You will need at least ten Clongusburg Blocks. Arrange them in the same shape as a Nether Portal. To light the portal you will need a Pieonomicon. If you are unsure on how to obtain Clongusburg Blocks or a Pieonomicon check the recipe section of this page.

### Getting Out:
All you have to do is go back through the portal. If your portal has been destroyed or you are stranded far from the portal you have a few options. The first is to find a Burger Village. These have structures that spawn lit Nether Portals. This will allow you to leave the dimension. The second way is to become eliminated.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Tool Requirements</summary>
Any block not in this list probably has default tool requirements. For example Burger Wood is the same as oak wood in terms of breaking it and what it does.

### Pickaxe Mineable:
- Clumpinium Ore (Stone and Deepslate variants)
- Clumpinium Block
- Burginium Ore
- Burginium Block
- Throngusite Ore
- Throngusite Block
- Clongusburg Block
- Burger Stone
- Cobbled Burger
- Charred Burger
- Charred Cobbled Burger
- Halamajama Ore (Burger Stone and Charred Burger variants)
- Halamajama Block
- Clikstor Ore (Burger Stone and Charred Burger variants)
- Clikstor Block
- PieZombie Ore (Burger Stone and Charred Burger variants)
- PieZombie Block
- Trunky Ore (Burger Stone and Charred Burger variants)
- Trunky Block
- Safe (Single chest only but can store more than a single chest)
- Juicer (Crafting Block)
- Auto Miner (Only mines west)

### Shovel Mineable:
- Burger Block
- Burger Block Path
- Patty
- Moldy Patty

### Stone Tool or Higher:
- Burger Stone
- Cobbled Burger
- Charred Burger
- Charred Cobbled Burger
- Safe (Single chest only but can store more than a single chest)
- Juicer (Crafting Block)

### Diamond Tool or Higher:
- Clumpinium Ore (Stone and Deepslate variants)
- Clumpinium Block
- Burginium Ore
- Burginium Block
- Throngusite Ore
- Throngusite Block
- Clongusburg Block
- Halamajama Ore (Burger Stone and Charred Burger variants)
- Halamajama Block
- Clikstor Ore (Burger Stone and Charred Burger variants)
- Clikstor Block
- PieZombie Ore (Burger Stone and Charred Burger variants)
- PieZombie Block
- Trunky Ore (Burger Stone and Charred Burger variants)
- Trunky Block
- Auto Miner (Only mines west)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Ore Locations and Information</summary>
There are seven ores added to the game. They require Diamond Pickaxes or higher to break. Four of the ores are located in the Burger Dimension. The others remain in vanilla dimensions.

### Vanilla Dimensions:
- Clumpinium Ore is found in the Overworld between y16 and y-64. It spawns in Stone and Deepslate variants.
  
- Burginium Ore is found anywhere in the Nether. It spawns only in Netherrack.
 
- Throngusite Ore is found anywhere in the End. It spawns only in End Stone.

### Burger Dimension:
- Halamajama Ore is found between y16 and y-64. It spawns in Burger Stone and Charred Burger variants. 

- Clikstor Ore is found between y16 and y-64. It spawns in Burger Stone and Charred Burger variants. 

- PieZombie Ore is found between y16 and y-64. It spawns in Burger Stone and Charred Burger variants. 

- Trunky Ore is found between y16 and y-64. It spawns in Burger Stone and Charred Burger variants.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Crafting Recipes</summary>

## Vanilla Crafting:
Recipes in Vanilla Crafting are in First, Second, and Third row order starting from the top of the crafting table inventory and going left to right.

### Items:
- Glass Jug: You need 7 Glass in the shape of a cauldron recipe.

- Clumpy Bros Glass Jar: This is in a cauldron recipe shape. Orange Stained Glass, nothing, Orange Stained Glass. Cyan Stained Glass, nothing, Cyan Stained Glass. Cyan Stained Glass, Cyan Stained Glass, Cyan Stained Glass.

- Pieonomicon: Clongusburg Ingot, nothing, Clongusburg Ingot. nothing, Netherrack, nothing. Clongusburg Ingot, nothing, Clongusburg Ingot.

- Burger Heart: Halamajama Ingot, Burger Heart, Trunky Ingot. Clikstor Ingot, Burger Stone, PieZombie Ingot. Clumpinium Ingot, Burginium Ingot, Throngusite Ingot. (You must obtain it by defeating Burger Boss. This recipe is similar to how the Netherite Upgrade Smithing Template works but this one is for Burger Armor and Tools).

### Enchantments
- Busted Burger: It takes a Burger Man’s Heart, an Unbreaking 3 book, and a Mending book in a crafting grid. 

### Music Discs:
All are dropped by creepers.

- My Slime Girl Music Disc: Throngusite Ingot, Clikstor Ingot, Clumpinium Ingot. nothing, Burger Book, nothing. Throngusite Ingot, Clikstor Ingot, Clumpinium Ingot.

- The Blender Music Disc: Throngusite Ingot, PieZombie Ingot, Clumpinium Ingot. nothing, Burger Book, nothing. Throngusite Ingot, PieZombie Ingot, Clumpinium Ingot.

- Bigger Dreams Music Disc: Throngusite Ingot, Halamajama Ingot, Clumpinium Ingot. nothing, Burger Book, nothing. Throngusite Ingot, Halamajama Ingot, Clumpinium Ingot.

- My Slinky Music Disc: Throngusite Ingot, Trunky Ingot, Clumpinium Ingot. nothing, Burger Book, nothing. Throngusite Ingot, Trunky Ingot, Clumpinium Ingot.

- The Clumpy Bros Music Disc: Throngusite Ingot, nothing, Clumpinium Ingot. nothing, Burger Book, nothing. Throngusite Ingot, nothing, Clumpinium Ingot.

### Ingots:
- Clumpinium, Burginium, Throngusite, Halamajama, Clikstor, PieZombie, and Trunky Ingots: These are all obtained by smelting the ore block, smelting the raw ore item, or putting a full block in the crafting table. So for example the Clumpinium Ingot can be obtained by smelting Clumpinium Ore or Raw Clumpinium in a Furnace or Blast Furnace. It can also be done by taking a Clumpinium Block and putting it in a crafting table.
  
- Clongusburg Ingot: 3 Clumpinium Ingots. 3 Burginium Ingots. 3 Throngusite Ingots. If you have a Clongusburg block you can put it into a crafting table to revert it back to ingots.

### Blocks:
- Clumpinium, Burginium, Throngusite, Clongusburg, Halamajama, Clikstor, PieZombie, and Trunky Blocks can be made with 9 of each Ingot. For example 9 Clumpinium Ingots would make a Clumpinium Block.

- Burger Block: Put a Burger Block Path in a Stonecutter.

- Burger Block Path: Put a Burger Block in a Stonecutter.

- Congealed Burger Grease Block: 9 Congealed Burger Grease.

- Burger Stone: Cobbled Burger in a furnace.

- Charred Burger: Charred Cobbled Burger in a furnace.

- Auto Miner: Clongusburg Ingot, Burger Heart, Clongusburg Ingot. Clongusburg Ingot, Burger Pickaxe, Clongusburg Ingot. Clongusburg Ingot, Clongusburg Ingot, Clongusburg Ingot.
  - The Auto Miner has an inventory with four buttons. They are labeled Power, Pause, Direction, and Size. With Power you can turn the Auto Miner on and off. Pause allows you to stop the Auto Miner but keep the beam lit. Direction allows you to mine North, South, East, or West. Size allows you to go from 1x1 to 2x2 or a 3x3 mineable area. There are also three info tips under the four buttons which let you know the status, facing direction, and area it is able to mine. It has the inventory size of a double chest but it has four pages of inventory. It can mine forever by generating its own chunks and in case you lose it there is a command to locate the auto miner. /autominer locate will display the coordinates of the Auto Miner. When the Auto Miner’s inventory is full it will automatically pause itself. There is a secondary command which is only useful if for some reason there are issues with the tracking (ghost auto miners). This command does require elevated permissions. /autominer remove_ghosts .

- Safe: Iron Ingot, Iron Ingot, Iron Ingot. Iron Ingot, Clongusburg Ingot, Iron Ingot. Iron Ingot, Iron Ingot, Iron Ingot. (Single chest only but can store more than a single chest).

- Juicer: Same as Stonecutter recipe shape. Iron Ingot, Burger Grease Bucket, Iron Ingot. Iron Ingot, Iron Ingot, Iron Ingot.

- Peanut Bowl: Same as Minecart Shape. Iron Ingot, nothing, Iron Ingot. Iron Ingot, Clumpinium, Iron Ingot. (Can store peanuts for decoration mostly).

### Wood:
The same way all wood works in the game.

### Armor and Tools:
- Burger Dome Locator: Same shape as a compass. nothing, Burger Block, nothing. Burger Block, Clongusburg Ingot, Burger Block. nothing, Burger Block, nothing. (Allows you to locate the Burger Dome easier.)

- Burger Book: Clongusburg Ingot, nothing, Clongusburg Ingot. Burginium Ingot, Burger Heart, Burginium Ingot. Clongusburg Ingot, nothing, Clongusburg Ingot. (Infinite Flint and Steel).

The following can be repaired with Clongusburg Ingots at an anvil. They are also all done in a Smithing Table (so the order will be left to right):

- Burger Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, and Boots: Netherite Armor Piece, Clongusburg Ingot, Burger Heart.

- Burger Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, and Hoe: Netherite Tool, Clongusburg Ingot, Burger Heart.

### Food:
There are other things that are "food" check the Food tab.

- Burger: Burginium Ingot, nothing, Burginium Ingot. nothing Raw Burginium, nothing. Burginium Ingot, nothing, Burginium Ingot.

- Huge Curve: Burger, nothing, Burger. nothing, Burginium Ingot, nothing. Burger, nothing, Burger.

- Huh: Golden Foods(any), nothing, Golden Foods(any). Burger Heart, Pieonomicon, Burger Heart. Golden Foods(any), nothing, Golden Foods(any). (Warning! Do not use it in a village unless you like raids and other fun things).

- Charred Burger Patty: Put a Burger in a Smoker or a Furnace.

- Roasted Peanut: Put a Peanut in a Smoker or a Furnace.

## Juicer Crafting:
To use the Juicer you need to have made it first. It is like a furnace but it has 3 input slots and requires no fuel. The recipes below are in First, Second, and Third slot order so top to bottom.

- Halamajama's Special Drink: Halamajama Ingot, Glass Jug, Water Bucket.
- Clikstor's Special Drink: Clikstor Ingot, Glass Jug, Water Bucket.
- PieZombie's Special Drink: PieZombie Ingot, Glass Jug, Water Bucket.
- Trunky's Special Drink: Trunky Ingot, Glass Jug, Water Bucket.
- Congealed Burger Grease: Burger Grease Bucket (First slot only).
- Peanut Butter: Roasted Peanut: (First slot only).
- Jar of Peanut Butter: Peanut Butter Food, Clumpy Bros Glass Jar, nothing.

## Not Craftable:
- Burger Boy, Camloymus, and Bortymus Blocks: See Not Obtainable Without Cheats.

- Burger Boss Spawn Egg: See Not Obtainable Without Cheats.

- Burger Grease Bucket: You get this like you do Water or Lava Buckets.

- Peanut Seeds and Peanuts: Farms in Burger Villages in the Burger Dimension.

- Patty and Moldy Patty: Found in the Burger Dimension.

- Burger Flower: Found in the Overworld and Burger Dimension.

- Burger Log and Stripped Burger Log: Burger Logs are from the Burger Trees found in the Overworld and Burger Dimension.

- Burger Leaves: Found on Burger Trees.

- Burger Sapling: Dropped from leaves of Burger Trees.

## Not Obtainable Without Cheats

- Camloymus, and Bortymus Blocks: Not in survival just creative menu for now.
- Burger Boy Block: Is the dimensions Bedrock.
- Burger Boss Spawn Egg: Not in survival just creative menu for now.
</details>


<details>
<summary>Enchantments</summary>

Thundering: This enchantment can be applied to tools. It ranges from level 1 to 5. When hitting a living entity lightning will strike. The higher the level the more lightning. Can be obtained through the enchantment table.

Busted Burger: This can be applied to tools, weapons, armor, and elytra. You will lose no durability on whatever this enchantment is put on. It can only be obtained through crafting. It takes a Burger Man’s Heart, an Unbreaking 3 book, and a Mending book in a crafting grid.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Advancements</summary>

- First of Three: Obtain Raw Clumpinium
- Second Is The Best: Obtain Raw Burginium
- 2+2=4-1=3 Quick Maths: Obtain Raw Throngusite
- Weird Looking Burger: Obtain a Clongusburg Ingot
- BURGERS EVERYWHERE!: Enter the Burger Dimension
- Burger Boss Down: Defeat the Burger Boss
- What Could Be Made With This?: Obtain the Juicer
- Gross!: Obtain Congealed Burger Grease
- Maybe It Was All Worth It: Obtain a Jar of Peanut Butter

</details>


<details>
<summary>Food</summary>
These are all of the things that are edible. Some may be safer than others.

- Burger
- Huge Curve
- Peanut
- Roasted Peanut
- Peanut Butter (This can be thrown or eaten. Crouch and press whatever your keybind is to eat)
- Jar of Peanut Butter
- Charred Burger Patty
- Congealed Burger Grease
- Huh (Warning! Do not use it in a village unless you like raids and other fun things).
- Raw Burginium
- Burginium Ingot
- Clongusburg Ingot
- Halamajama Special Drink
- Clikstor Special Drink
- PieZombie Special Drink
- Trunky Special Drink
</details>

<details>
<summary>Structures</summary>
The structures only spawn in the Burger Dimension:

- Burger Dome: Spawns in all four biomes. This is where the Burger Boss is located.
- Obsidian Among Us: Spawns in the Dongus Biome.
- Pie's Mansion: Spawns in the Frick Biome.
- Villager Hall: Spawns in the Ark Biome.
- Burger Village: Spawns in all four biomes.
- ClumpBrondalds: Spawns in all four biomes. Has an entity inside named John Topher.

The Burger Village has a random chance to spawn these structures:

- Chest Room
- Clikstor's Bar
- Clikstor's House
- Halamajama's House
- Court House
- Hot Snake Room
- Nut Shack
- Nether Portal Building
- Peanut Farm
</details>

For any questions or issues not answered on this page join the Discord for support.
